Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/agent.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(f'Valid JSON: {len\(d\)} questions'\); cats=set\(q['subcategory'] for q in d\); print\(f'Subcategories: {cats}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/agent.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(f'Valid: {len\(d\)} questions'\); cats={}; [cats.update\({q['subcategory']: cats.get\(q['subcategory'],0\)+1}\) for q in d]; [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in sorted\(cats.items\(\)\)]")
